title: tibisia farcta
intro: Tibisia farcta, also known as False Tithonia, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Tibisia farcta are said to include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory tract infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, Tibisia farcta is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
